zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Lester於1670年8月30日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦時，她的父親Sergeant Daniel Lester28歲，母親Hannah Fox21歲。她於1687年與Thomas Way在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1754年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈文 可隆尼昆尼皮亞費艾爾 哈文享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Lester于1670年8月30日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦时，她的父亲Sergeant Daniel Lester28岁，母亲Hannah Fox21岁。她于1687年与Thomas Way在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1754年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈文 可隆尼昆尼皮亞費艾爾 哈文享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Leicester, which is recorded as Ligeraceastre in the 10th century. The placename derives from an Old English folk name Legore ‘the dwellers by the river Legor (a lost river name)’ + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lestre in Normandy.
English and Scottish: variant of   Lister  .

variants.name: Luster
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Lester  . This surname is common among African Americans.
German: habitational name for someone from any of the places called Lust (see   Lust   2).
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): either an artificial extension of Lust 1 or from southern German Luster ‘chandelier’.

variants.name: Lassiter
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Leicester (see   Lester  ). This name has been long established in North America, and occurs in a wide variety of forms.

variants.name: Lister
meanings: English: occupational name for a dyer of cloth, Middle English li(te)ster, a derivative of Middle English lit(t)en (Old Norse lita) ‘to dye’. This term was used principally in East Anglia and northern and eastern England (areas of Scandinavian settlement), and to this day the surname is found principally in these regions, especially in Yorkshire.

variants.name: Laster
meanings: occupational name for a maker of cobblers’ lasts, from Middle English last, lest, the wooden form in the shape of a foot used for making or repairing shoes (Old English lǣste from lāst ‘footprint’).

variants.name: Leister
meanings: German: occupational name for a maker of lasts or a cobbler, from Middle High German leist + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.description: Fair Haven was originally a village formed in 1679 to house industrial workers

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Lester was born on 30 August 1670, in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Sergeant Daniel Lester, was 28 and her mother, Hannah Fox, was 21. She married Thomas Way in 1687, in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1754, in Fair Haven, Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Lester est née le 30 août 1670, à New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Sergeant Daniel Lester, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Hannah Fox, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Way en 1687, à New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1754, à Fair Haven, Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Lester am 30. August 1670 in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sergeant Daniel Lester 28 und ihre Mutter Hannah Fox 21. Sie hat 1687 in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Thomas Way geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1754 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Fair Haven, Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Lester è nata il il 30 agosto 1670 nel New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Sergeant Daniel Lester, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Hannah Fox, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Way nel 1687, nel New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1754, nel Fair Haven, Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Lesterが1670年8月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンで生まれた時，父Sergeant Daniel Lesterは28歳，母Hannah Foxは21歳であった。1687年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンでThomas Wayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1754年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヘイベン コロニークイニパアックファイル ヘイベンで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Lester(이)가 1670년 8월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sergeant Daniel Lester(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Fox(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1687년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던에서 Thomas Way(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1754년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 하븐 콜론이 퀸이피악 파어 하븐에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Lester родилась 30 августа 1670 г. в местности ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Sergeant Daniel Lester было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Fox, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Way в 1687 г. в местности ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1754 г. в местности феир хавен, куиннипяк, ню хавен колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann Lester nació el 30 de agosto de 1670, en New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Sergeant Daniel Lester, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Hannah Fox, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas Way en 1687, en New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1754, en Fair Haven, Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 84 años.
